/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_camera.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_file_read.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_input.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_math2d.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_quad.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_renderer2d.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_shader.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_texture.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_time.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_transform.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/src/lum_window.c.o CMakeFiles/Luminous_playground.dir/glad.c.o -o Luminous_playground  glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
